rspress.purpose: RSPress 2.x authority: framework source (packages/core/src) and the official site docs (website/docs/en); pinned to the installed @rspress/core version

orientation.layout: Sparse checkout of two trees. packages/core/src is the @rspress/core source: node/ (build pipeline, plugin driver, config), runtime/ and theme/ (client runtime and default theme), cli/, config/, shiki-transformers.ts. website/docs/en is the official docs site markdown: guide/, api/, plugin/ (plugin-authoring docs), ui/.

keyPaths.packages/core/src/node: build pipeline, plugin hook driver, user-config handling
keyPaths.packages/core/src/theme: default theme components (what our runtime components sit alongside)
keyPaths.website/docs/en/plugin: official plugin-authoring docs — hook semantics and plugin API
keyPaths.website/docs/en/api: config and API reference for rspress.config.ts surface

twoslash.purpose: Twoslash authority: core engine source (packages/twoslash/src) and the twoslash notation/semantics docs (docs); pinned to the installed transitive twoslash version

orientation.layout: packages/twoslash/src is the core engine: core.ts (twoslasher pipeline), validation.ts, error.ts, fallback.ts, flag-keys.ts, defaults.ts, types/. docs/ is the notation/semantics site source: guide/ holds the authoritative notation reference (queries, directives, cut markers).

keyPaths.packages/twoslash/src/core.ts: the twoslasher pipeline — how notations are parsed and applied

shiki.purpose: Shiki authority: the @shikijs/twoslash integration package we consume directly (packages/twoslash) and the underlying shiki core (packages/shiki); pinned to the installed shiki version

orientation.layout: packages/twoslash is @shikijs/twoslash — the Shiki transformer we consume directly: src/ (transformerTwoslash, renderer-rich, renderer-classic, icons), style-rich.css / style-classic.css (the hover/popup CSS our _twoslash.css mirrors), test/. packages/shiki is the shiki core package (highlighter entry, bundles); its src re-exports @shikijs/core internals.

keyPaths.packages/twoslash/src: transformerTwoslash + rich renderer — the HAST our ShikiCrossLinker post-processes
keyPaths.packages/twoslash/style-rich.css: upstream popup/hover CSS that plugin runtime styling aligns with
keyPaths.packages/shiki/src: shiki core entry — highlighter creation, bundle composition

rsbuild.purpose: Rsbuild authority: @rsbuild/core source (packages/core/src) and the official site docs (website/docs/en) — the bundler layer under RSPress; pinned to the installed @rsbuild/core version

orientation.layout: packages/core/src is @rsbuild/core: createRsbuild.ts / createCompiler.ts (entry flow), hooks.ts and pluginManager.ts (plugin system), rspackConfig.ts + plugins/ (how user config becomes rspack config), server/ (dev server), configChain.ts / mergeConfig.ts. website/docs/en is the official docs: config/ (every rsbuild config option), api/ (JS API + plugin API), guide/, plugins/.

keyPaths.packages/core/src/rspackConfig.ts: how rsbuild config is lowered to rspack config — where builderConfig options land
keyPaths.packages/core/src/pluginManager.ts: rsbuild plugin system — hook registration and ordering
keyPaths.website/docs/en/config: authoritative reference for the builderConfig surface RSPress exposes
keyPaths.website/docs/en/api: JS API and plugin API docs
